Description: Statistical industry classification code assigned to each stock in the GLOBAL universe, representing its categorical grouping according to a static, point-in-time logic intended for industry/sector-based research and peer neutralization
Statistical industry group assignment for each stock on each date in the GLOBAL universe, based on a static classification algorithm
An integer code indicating the statistical industry classification group assigned to a US-listed equity on a specific date, based on a static, news-driven regime logic

Unordered categorical code representing the statistical industry/peer group assignment for each global stock on each date, based on fundamental similarity within the GLOBAL_companyGrouping_Peer module
A categorical code representing the point-in-time assignment of a stock to a statistically derived industry group (based on price-volume clustering) within the global universe
Unordered categorical code indicating the statistical industry group assignment for each stock, based on price-volume clustering within the GLOBAL region, as of a specific date
Categorical code representing a statistically-derived industry or peer grouping assignment for each stock on each date within the GLOBAL universe, using price-volume based clustering logic (pvgroup3)

Point-in-time categorical code representing the statistical industry sector classification for a given global equity, using a stable, audit-grade taxonomy such as SEC or equivalent, with values specific to each date and stock
